---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Is this related to a frustration with the current API?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Include API examples if possible:

```dart
// Example usage of the proposed feature
Text('Hello')
  .proposedMethod(TwTokens.value)
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g., Tailwind CSS docs for equivalent feature).
